flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Duquesne University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($22.7k → $26.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Duquesne University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.5k → $49.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Duquesne University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
